/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/unikey-wayland.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/unikey-wayland.dir/unikey-wayland_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/unikey-wayland.dir/input-method-unstable-v1-protocol.c.o" "CMakeFiles/unikey-wayland.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/unikey-wayland.dir/src/trayicon.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/unikey-wayland.dir/src/macrodialog.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/unikey-wayland.dir/src/windowtracker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/unikey-wayland.dir/src/main.cpp.o" -o unikey-wayland  -lwayland-client -lm /home/truonghieu/Downloads/Uk362/wayland-client/src/libbamboo.a /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 -lrt /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so -lgcc_s_asneeded -lgcc_s_asneeded
